title: Canid's Horses
description: An equestrian texture pack for those who love having a flip ton of coats!!
body:
An equestrian texture pack for those who love having a flip ton of coats!!



This pack includes

Fresh Animations

Updated Horse Model

Over 77+ Possible Horse Coats

2 Saddle Variants Brown/Black

Renamed Horse Armors: Leather=Halter Iron=English Saddlepad Gold=Western Saddlepad Diamond=Blanket
